sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-03-20 06:19
- Distance: 6.1 km
- Moving time: 32:40
- Elapsed time: 32:51
- Elevation gain: 44.4 m
- Average heart rate: 177.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 188 bpm
- Average watts: 215.4 W
- Average speed: 11.3 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `179.1 bpm`, ranging from `173.1` to `183.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `164.6 spm`, with a working range of `151.6` to `171.5 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `169.3 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `157.5 spm` (-11.8 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:20 /km` across `6.125 km` in `32:40` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `4:54 /km` and second-half pace was `5:46 /km` (+51 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `177.5 bpm` average and `188 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `172.1 bpm` in the first half and `182.0 bpm` in the second (+9.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `32:40` out of `32:51` elapsed (99.4%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `5` stop segments and `1.2%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `62.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.6 m` and `17.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `28.6 m` in the first half and `34.0 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
